message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column aggregation helpers (frankenpandas-r2eu)

Thin Column wrappers over the fp-types nan-aware reductions so callers
don't have to reach across crate boundaries for basic stats:

- sum / mean / min / max / median / prod — all skip missing values by
  default (pandas skipna=True). Empty-column conventions match pandas:
  sum → 0.0, prod → 1.0, mean → Null(NaN).
- count — non-missing population size.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
